full_text:
Pang De (Lingming) 龐德 (令明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang De (龐德), styledLingming (令明), was born in Huan Dao of the Nan An Prefecture. Served Ma Chao, Zhang Lu, then Cao Cao. Fought against Guan Yu at Fancheng. Pang De was affiliated with Ma Teng, Ma Chao, Zhang Lu, and the Wei Kingdom. Pang De lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
